subject: The story of George Santos has become one of the failing of Republicans, our media and to a lesser degree Democrats, for not stopping this man. Read on for a fascinating interview with the former Congressman for this district, Rep. Steve Israel, who also ran the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) election efforts for a cycle or two while in Congress.
body:
How does a guy like this slip through?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta59564c0-75e2-4daa-8e51-5ea4cea33aff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I hope you had a wonderful New Year's Eve! Blue Amp Action wishes you the best in 2023! Here is the latest edition of our short newsletter: *** ****The story of George Santos [has become one of the failing of Republicans, our media and to a lesser degree Democrats, for not stopping this man](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbba6972b-b857-4c7a-9459-b7228eac4537/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).** A fascinating interview with the former Congressman for this district, Rep. Steve Israel, who also ran the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) election efforts for a cycle or two while in Congress. Full interview here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7dMibEdgd_Q&t=1254s](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a6e608f-386b-470e-9741-6e5b401da5db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Three major reasons for this failure, here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xj9G_zPXsiE&t=1s](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te18e6eba-c26f-467e-b43e-3940c0663d5a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * **TX Gov Greg Abbott likes to claim Christianity, **[**but his cruelty to immigrants makes you wonder if he's ever read the "Parable Of The Good Samaritan"** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e11c527-d48e-4779-bb5e-e595397e254b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)& myriad other places his holy book/savior tells him to do the opposite of what he's done to the poor, those suffering emotional or bodily injury, etc: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WJW28uEjU6Q&t=5s](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td282c7bb-f38f-4beb-9ad5-07fd8f0aaa6a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * **Russia-loving MAGA nuts [caught on video](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9caac1cd-1ec2-4242-b485-009b733a4879/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2Ukz9r42TYw](https://default.salsalabs.org/T542cd67b-2482-4f43-9e30-06b58ba5591e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * Additionally, when it comes to their own, Republicans aren't shy about shanking them when they begin to see them as a liability. Think Madiscon Cawthorn. Santos may wanna begin placing eyes on his back: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TuSZdOLs48E](https://default.salsalabs.org/T43f2d7e6-9806-485b-a004-07556d546d55/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * **[Have a canine best friend in your life? We know they need to eat, and Bezzie’s meal delivery plans give you a custom mix of the dog food specifically tailored to the nutritional needs of your little pawed pal. Sign up to try Bezzie through BlueAmp and get 50% off your first order, plus free shipping!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf3627acb-ce09-4615-879f-cc1b9d2dd730/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks for reading this edition of the Blue Amp Action Newsletter! And once again, Happy New Year!! Cliff

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2ebdca5-7256-468e-af90-b00735a2b3e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

It's a game changer. Listen to the podcast to truly understand: [The Brunson Case](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/7fOLqIg53/c?w=0ez07Iywqc7QhnNYMFIgLgrOBhk4cBIGUhTR-6Sm5WQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmNob3IuZm0vZGFsaWxhLWVwcGVyc29uL2VwaXNvZGVzL1RoZS1CcnVuc29uLUNhc2UtLUphbi02dGgtLTIwMjMtZTFzdG0zbCIsInIiOiIwZDlkNjU0ZC0zYzViLTQwMWEtN2VhYi1mNmU0MWViYTg3ZWUiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJiMTM1ZmQ0Ni05OTJhLTQyOGItYTljMC0yZjA0ZDk4MDU1Y2UifQ)An 18 minute overview and you will be just excited as I am! name: Supreme Court Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Do you think SCOTUS should be expanded?
body:
| | |
---
| | Last month, SCOTUS heard oral arguments in _Moore v. Harper_ , a case that could give state legislators near-total power over federal elections.**And, from overturning _Roe v. Wade_ to harming the EPA’s ability to fight climate change, it’s clear that the Supreme Court’s rulings don’t reflect what the majority of Americans want. ** One proposed solution from Congressional Democrats is to expand the Supreme Court. But increasing the number of justices on the court is controversial, so we are polling our supporters to see what local Democrats think about it. name: Matt Diemer
subject: Looking forward to 2023!
body:
| |
---
Peter, Happy New Year Everyone! **** First, the whole team and I want to truly thank everyone once again for helping during my congressional election. It was such an honor to be the Democratic candidate for Ohio’s 7th district.

Don’t worry. I am not writing to ask for money. I just want to keep the connection we fostered since April of 2021. Once a month or so I will write and give you my thoughts. I am hoping that we can keep each other motivated to make a positive change coming into 2023 and moving into the 2024 presidential election. **** Overall we won Cuyahoga County as a whole. This was a shock not only to the GOP, but also paves the way for further successes. **** [Here is an XLS of the data from our race. Feel free to use it and share it. It is all public data](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0skG8WwJM-kTMg1XVB3RtdfoFE8Z1SlobgCVN6nLWAuFE14OQQHpPKtJ-0tidPbJzNmdvpLBZOP77TIRulPFj_aTmRtHiKfq_cA55EWmaGVPM0Uqt6ntZcmJLiRnj5rXcpbaKDq6TR1IEf-C-fcKrP4lvmt9JJw1IVKPOBhjGL4dkpJ30Djel8ttlevkek4WNf73PBhO1knS9C4yTZs8YU8qh4UkFz9NDnLB3NcA-3_c_nr0mWMhJMrYd7sdM1TRxwYHbYvf0InEszcnFj7bvyYjVgT4uqsEFhgmid469cOe0clAKOC7jeAXtgvrnnDyHVC6v1ZYDvibKJe0WE-C830/3si/rtDvG3ABTTeJzeCtoFpLzw/h0/jcrc5fV7JQeDLf1vbgcyPfllgpASaCt7qhopGMcWrX0). **** Some notable results: Bay Village, Rocky River, Solon, Berea, Brooklyn, Fairview Park, North Olmsted, and Olmsted Falls are all solid BLUE. **** This is amazing because as I moved around the county, people would comment that these cities were “Solid Red.” This goes to show the massive amount of work and commitment that people within those communities have been putting in. Thank You. **** There are also some places that are very close to turning Blue in 2023 & 2024\. Those cities are: Olmsted Township, Parma, Middleburg Hts, Brook Park, & Brecksville. **** These are cities that are Red by only the smallest margins. I am hopeful that with a message of uniting not dividing, and focusing on local issues that bring prosperity to every household we can usher in a roadmap to a bright future for Ohio. **** Finally, on January 3rd the 118th congress is getting sworn in. There will be a lot of new faces in D.C. who have made lots of promises. Follow your congressperson closely and make sure they are living up to their promises, and voting in a way that reflects your values and your interests. **** Again, Happy New Year! Here is to a 2023 of fulfilling work. Matt Diemer
---
|
---
Diemer for Congress P.O. clean_body: | | Peter, Happy New Year Everyone! ** First, the whole team and I want to truly thank everyone once again for helping during my congressional election. It was such an honor to be the Democratic candidate for Ohio’s 7th district. Don’t worry. I am not writing to ask for money. I just want to keep the connection we fostered since April of 2021. Once a month or so I will write and give you my thoughts. I am hoping that we can keep each other motivated to make a positive change coming into 2023 and moving into the 2024 presidential election. Overall we won Cuyahoga County as a whole. This was a shock not only to the GOP, but also paves the way for further successes. . Some notable results: Bay Village, Rocky River, Solon, Berea, Brooklyn, Fairview Park, North Olmsted, and Olmsted Falls are all solid BLUE. This is amazing because as I moved around the county, people would comment that these cities were “Solid Red.” This goes to show the massive amount of work and commitment that people within those communities have been putting in. Thank You. There are also some places that are very close to turning Blue in 2023 & 2024\. Those cities are: Olmsted Township, Parma, Middleburg Hts, Brook Park, & Brecksville. These are cities that are Red by only the smallest margins. I am hopeful that with a message of uniting not dividing, and focusing on local issues that bring prosperity to every household we can usher in a roadmap to a bright future for Ohio. Finally, on January 3rd the 118th congress is getting sworn in. There will be a lot of new faces in D.C. who have made lots of promises. Follow your congressperson closely and make sure they are living up to their promises, and voting in a way that reflects your values and your interests. ** Again, Happy New Year! Here is to a 2023 of fulfilling work. Matt Diemer | Diemer for Congress P.O. Box 16753 Rocky River, Ohio 44116 | | | Sent via . name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b04b0656b0cb4e498c7188b76a9d84c9&_e=PpLOtCZ-ZsAF21Qf3gqpMRntYwZpI3Eio7ZUg3noxAnnuvKtY4lmwZVR5ta9akLdvjDv-qcrf4jD0lcdeusFqbtwRZru35PR8H-3stWkJLi6RYZEt2PC7GJ9erZpshSdCm9FLwaveoUT_WyaqdstK1UkDDT15m_YR9T-_xZ95SIOGVqs44kcAdUnCe56XK03NZGUp0kXYafjQCaJ0m36afXLvUKrv9LMkLWzv6bW4x_v1C0i0-S5ExSKbDQHEqIfaC7ajWS_YVuAGk7_rVRUmhucddSeyIQCqzlygbfUDTx5_VwFpq1E8saCM9bREEQRL2PSHIBmDfdoaXYbkHc3jpMKUBlA2Fp6BB0W1eWGjV_mLbUstEGv-6rnwkhNYm_W3cDqgJI_YIaaCgc-5w0ATkk_OdeLFYQpVhHfgILsr1g436BGaWN6Fci81GyPIBcl)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith—making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b04b0656b0cb4e498c7188b76a9d84c9&_e=PpLOtCZ-ZsAF21Qf3gqpMRntYwZpI3Eio7ZUg3noxAnnuvKtY4lmwZVR5ta9akLdvjDv-qcrf4jD0lcdeusFqbtwRZru35PR8H-3stWkJLi6RYZEt2PC7GJ9erZpshSdCm9FLwaveoUT_WyaqdstK1UkDDT15m_YR9T-_xZ95SIOGVqs44kcAdUnCe56XK03NZGUp0kXYafjQCaJ0m36afXLvUKrv9LMkLWzv6bW4x_v1C0i0-S5ExSKbDQHEqIfaC7ajWS_YVuAGk7_rVRUmmGIjVbLbV1NnJEUtVwznC1ERfy1kVIaM6ctNHpeC6pp1KI2XOV_vRyxW6Vv7xdRAbxjhugyheKiRJwf_KbSSiOOG7iYd98RmpZPwpozJzqL4pUbD5EwD7darbhLOmbq3B_wcrntiWzqOUJSxf8240LsGDgxiZwZIEaQzaJiUBG2)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b04b0656b0cb4e498c7188b76a9d84c9&_e=PpLOtCZ-ZsAF21Qf3gqpMRntYwZpI3Eio7ZUg3noxAnnuvKtY4lmwZVR5ta9akLdvjDv-qcrf4jD0lcdeusFqbtwRZru35PR8H-3stWkJLi6RYZEt2PC7GJ9erZpshSdCm9FLwaveoUT_WyaqdstK1UkDDT15m_YR9T-_xZ95SIOGVqs44kcAdUnCe56XK03NZGUp0kXYafjQCaJ0m36afXLvUKrv9LMkLWzv6bW4x_v1C0i0-S5ExSKbDQHEqIfaC7ajWS_YVuAGk7_rVRUmjGGUpA4GYC09BpsJ8Xnk8392_tDkLU1LeRKCXqaD9rS9-Tyfc_7aHScnL3kqRy3DwnitUKkJqdHHvqQw8J7hsATXdOen6VknvuKEinqy85EX46SbAmsFzD9th57E83KM2mG-9wbf2Ik1IOAeP32MNA6UDDsSaEb1t-mRJ2cuWGF)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b04b0656b0cb4e498c7188b76a9d84c9&_e=PpLOtCZ-ZsAF21Qf3gqpMRntYwZpI3Eio7ZUg3noxAnnuvKtY4lmwZVR5ta9akLdvjDv-qcrf4jD0lcdeusFqbtwRZru35PR8H-3stWkJLi6RYZEt2PC7GJ9erZpshSdCm9FLwaveoUT_WyaqdstK1UkDDT15m_YR9T-_xZ95SIOGVqs44kcAdUnCe56XK03NZGUp0kXYafjQCaJ0m36afXLvUKrv9LMkLWzv6bW4x_v1C0i0-S5ExSKbDQHEqIfaC7ajWS_YVuAGk7_rVRUmqw15_tmxuwpfyz7buEvurJ62BrgLovIn7VJHjmKldHQjWYtsn2cQoTaqJ7YGJzjY9Am1dUe0-n_7p7ZOY_jiwqlMKP1rksV5VciEuDZxCk2UkZjxAYmq7QspyH8129GIgAsJSfbHl1Q6YCpl4mzSm-dFcz7DIzEGYczBXM3RUu-).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Dear friend.

First of all, happy new year. I hope that this New Year brings you all happiness, health, and prosperity.

As I reflect on this past year, I am reminded of all the hard work that my team and I put into achieving our goals. Unfortunately, we did not reach our final fundraising goal for the year, but I remain thankful for the incredible support you have shown. **_[If you can, make a contribution to help us start the new year strong>>](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=b396fa54713c4a528cf83d377232d232&_e=1qKZpOwlWOvqy4u7QB8eVSY6k2ALlFKmSY91bSF-dzSwB628X4y17BQPiDpcuj5LKZ_bZY-Z0zYqKVPjAJrC1UCsternXi5PeFCIklc1ZxyJhljAqfGmnJyeMHJRxLOgtFHtmxe00AKS-CQHNDSrRtNcbUxAIUTRXjhBArCLLemH0zzuta8lePjTQGfjvq5kWZwQ9rMSxjqQY7SmwKkoxShNLfLcCK0LQPD723sJJUtk67bJ_k_uqxNswsYPeL1VGy3EN2eSYX89gfFJQcRZ0oaTzwXdcCJJ1jsa5YXbM4l4zDydri1yeSV9JJDvYR-FKaFFyp2izrXf1myErZBAHpwRvAjkt2T3tlJ0gidIvToYw-qDO3QB-fnXaStiJLez2fN5Rp6gFGMKQ5nrIgzENa39zX--psTVRn-56pvyhUJ-l7NbssAB5heHGnU6Htqvg8kthAgjiWNy7jRQsyGD-Ao_A8cY6uEUqWnR1giRQI8qZLQNtZad3hFq-QOYuCx0)_**

**Let us not dwell on the past. The start of a new year is an opportunity to set new goals and work with renewed energy and resolve.** I am determined to build on the progress of the past years, now with a Republican majority in Congress. **[Will you help us reach our first fundraising goal, friend?](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=b396fa54713c4a528cf83d377232d232&_e=1qKZpOwlWOvqy4u7QB8eVSY6k2ALlFKmSY91bSF-dzSwB628X4y17BQPiDpcuj5LKZ_bZY-Z0zYqKVPjAJrC1UCsternXi5PeFCIklc1ZxyJhljAqfGmnJyeMHJRxLOgtFHtmxe00AKS-CQHNDSrRtNcbUxAIUTRXjhBArCLLemH0zzuta8lePjTQGfjvq5kWZwQ9rMSxjqQY7SmwKkoxShNLfLcCK0LQPD723sJJUtk67bJ_k_uqxNswsYPeL1VGy3EN2eSYX89gfFJQcRZ0oaTzwXdcCJJ1jsa5YXbM4l4zDydri1yeSV9JJDvYR-FKaFFyp2izrXf1myErZBAHpwRvAjkt2T3tlJ0gidIvTpZHUgZQ_AKYIX5pYA5noQJMTsQqeV0rq54Xzuv-4wnZKO0vhfw2NJIvFlqA6v0M_DcTtgAuisVrob24Omy6pdNAD7NjAirl0ya0cMT3F_Vp6t6zJbgWrtcgC4ii8QQ-RcCCL0hbvuWI4rBH_JAtuWt)**

clean_body: New year, new goals, friend. | Dear friend. First of all, happy new year. I hope that this New Year brings you all happiness, health, and prosperity. As I reflect on this past year, I am reminded of all the hard work that my team and I put into achieving our goals. Unfortunately, we did not reach our final fundraising goal for the year, but I remain thankful for the incredible support you have shown. | Let us not dwell on the past. The start of a new year is an opportunity to set new goals and work with renewed energy and resolve. I am determined to build on the progress of the past years, now with a Republican majority in Congress. I am looking forward to saving America and protecting your freedom. - - Once again, I wish you all a very happy and prosperous New Year! Sincerely, | ---|--- Paid for by House Conservatives Trust Copyright (C) 2022 House Conservatives Trust, All rights reserved.
